sqlMap.sql: select survey_id, company_id, tenant_id, title, purpose, user_id, date_add(create_date, interval #offset# minute) as create_date, date_add(update_date, interval #offset# minute) as update_date, date_add(start_date, interval #offset# minute) as start_date, date_add(end_date, interval #offset# minute) as end_date, case when #primary# = '1' then user_name1 else user_name2 end as user_name, user_name1, user_name2, delete_user, update_user, use_status, open_days, result_public_flag, anonymous_flag, multi_answer_flag, participate_flag, attach_flag, modify_flag, draft_flag, response_flag, total_user, mail_flag, popup_flag, IFNULL(PARTICIPANTS, 0) AS PARTICIPANTS, IFNULL(PARTICIPATION, 0) AS PARTICIPATION, CLOSING_TEXT, USER_EXPOSED_FLAG from tbl_survey LEFT JOIN (SELECT SURVEY_ID SI, COUNT(DISTINCT USER_ID) PARTICIPANTS, MAX(CASE WHEN USER_ID = #userId# then 1 else 0 end) PARTICIPATION, COMPANY_ID C_ID, TENANT_ID T_ID FROM TBL_SURVEY_RESPONDENT GROUP BY SURVEY_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID) TSR ON SURVEY_ID = TSR.SI AND TENANT_ID = TSR.T_ID AND COMPANY_ID = TSR.C_ID

where use_status in (1, 2) and tenant_id = #tenantId# and modify_flag = 0
title like concat('%', concat(#title#, '%'))
user_name1 like concat('%', concat(#creatorName#, '%')) user_name2 like concat('%', concat(#creatorName#, '%'))
CASE WHEN DRAFT_FLAG = 1 THEN 'TMP' WHEN NOW() < DATE_ADD(START_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) THEN 'WAIT' WHEN USE_STATUS = 2 AND NOW() <= DATE_ADD(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) THEN 'PAUSE' WHEN NOW() <= DATE_ADD(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) THEN 'ING' WHEN NOW() > DATE_ADD(END_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) THEN 'END' ELSE 'END' END = #filterStatus#
title like concat('%', concat(#title#, '%'))
user_name1 like concat('%', concat(#creatorName#, '%')) user_name2 like concat('%', concat(#creatorName#, '%'))
(create_date >= #startDate# and create_date <= #endDate#)
draft_flag = 0
( survey_id not in ( select survey_id from tbl_survey where draft_flag = 1 and user_id != #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# ) )
AND ( ( (survey_id = -1 or user_id = #userId#)
survey_id in #surveyIds[]#
) OR ( RESULT_PUBLIC_FLAG = 2 AND (survey_id = -1 or user_id = #userId#)
survey_id in #surveyResultIds[]#
) )
(start_date <= #today# and end_date >= #today#) AND ( ( (survey_id = -1 or user_id = #userId#)
survey_id in #surveyIds[]#
) OR ( RESULT_PUBLIC_FLAG = 2 AND (survey_id = -1 or user_id = #userId#)
survey_id in #surveyResultIds[]#
) ) and draft_flag = 0
(end_date < #today#) AND ( ( (survey_id = -1 or user_id = #userId#)
survey_id in #surveyIds[]#
) OR ( RESULT_PUBLIC_FLAG = 2 AND (survey_id = -1 or user_id = #userId#)
survey_id in #surveyResultIds[]#
) ) and draft_flag = 0
user_id = #userId# and draft_flag = 0
user_id = #userId# and draft_flag = 1
sqlMap.select: select dept_cd_path from tbl_deptmaster where cn = #deptId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

select a.cn as dept_id, case when #primary# = '1' then a.displayname else a.displayname2 end as dept_name, a.displayname as dept_name1, a.displayname2 as dept_name2, a.mail as mail, #level# as dept_level, case when (select count(b.cn) from tbl_deptmaster b where a.cn = b.extensionattribute1 and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) = 0 then 0 else 1 end as has_sub from tbl_deptmaster a where a.cn = #deptId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId#

select a.cn as dept_id, case when #primary# = '1' then a.displayname else a.displayname2 end as dept_name, a.displayname as dept_name1, a.displayname2 as dept_name2, a.mail as mail, #level# as dept_level, case when (select count(b.cn) from tbl_deptmaster b where a.cn = b.extensionattribute1 and b.cn <> b.extensionattribute2 and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) = 0 then 0 else 1 end as has_sub from tbl_deptmaster a where a.extensionattribute1 = #deptId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and a.cn <> a.extensionattribute2 order by lpad(ifnull(a.extensionattribute15, 0), 6, 0), a.displayname

select count(aa.cn) from ( select cn from tbl_usermaster where department = #deptId# and cn != 'masteradmin' and cn not in (select cn from tbl_usermaster_retire where tenant_id = #tenantId#) and tenant_id = #tenantId#
union all
select a.cn from tbl_addjobmaster b join tbl_usermaster a on a.cn = b.cn and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id where b.deptid = #deptId# and b.tenant_id = #tenantId# and a.cn not in (select cn from tbl_usermaster_retire where tenant_id = #tenantId#) ) aa

SELECT CN AS CN, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END AS POSITION, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME AS DISPLAYNAME1, DISPLAYNAME2 AS DISPLAYNAME2, DEPARTMENT AS DEPARTMENT, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END AS DEPARTMENTNAME, DESCRIPTION AS DEPARTMENTNAME1, DESCRIPTION2 AS DEPARTMENTNAME2, TELEPHONENUMBER AS TELEPHONENUMBER, MAIL AS MAIL, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS USERIMAGE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# AND CN != 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT AA.CN AS CN, AA.POSITION AS POSITION, AA.DISPLAYNAME AS DISPLAYNAME, AA.DISPLAYNAME1 AS DISPLAYNAME1, AA.DISPLAYNAME2 AS DISPLAYNAME2, AA.DEPARTMENT AS DEPARTMENT, AA.DEPARTMENTNAME AS DEPARTMENTNAME, AA.DEPARTMENTNAME1 AS DEPARTMENTNAME1, AA.DEPARTMENTNAME2 AS DEPARTMENTNAME2, AA.TELEPHONENUMBER AS TELEPHONENUMBER, AA.MAIL AS MAIL, AA.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS USERIMAGE FROM ( SELECT CN AS CN, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END AS POSITION, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME AS DISPLAYNAME1, DISPLAYNAME2 AS DISPLAYNAME2, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DEPARTMENT AS DEPARTMENT, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END AS DEPARTMENTNAME, DESCRIPTION AS DEPARTMENTNAME1, DESCRIPTION2 AS DEPARTMENTNAME2, TELEPHONENUMBER AS TELEPHONENUMBER, MAIL AS MAIL, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE
DEPARTMENT = #deptId#
DEPARTMENT IN #deptList[]#
AND CN != 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UNION ALL
SELECT A.CN AS CN, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN A.TITLE ELSE A.TITLE2 END AS POSITION, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN A.DISPLAYNAME ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME, A.DISPLAYNAME AS DISPLAYNAME1, A.DISPLAYNAME2 AS DISPLAYNAME2, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.DEPARTMENT AS DEPARTMENT, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN A.DESCRIPTION ELSE A.DESCRIPTION2 END AS DEPARTMENTNAME, A.DESCRIPTION AS DEPARTMENTNAME1, A.DESCRIPTION2 AS DEPARTMENTNAME2, A.TELEPHONENUMBER AS TELEPHONENUMBER, A.MAIL AS MAIL, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE
B.DEPTID = #deptId#
B.DEPTID IN #deptList[]#
AND A.CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) AA ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC
LIMIT #startPoint#, #listCount#

SELECT CN AS CN, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END AS POSITION, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME AS DISPLAYNAME1, DISPLAYNAME2 AS DISPLAYNAME2, DEPARTMENT AS DEPARTMENT, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END AS DEPARTMENTNAME, DESCRIPTION AS DEPARTMENTNAME1, DESCRIPTION2 AS DEPARTMENTNAME2, TELEPHONENUMBER AS TELEPHONENUMBER, MAIL AS MAIL, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS USERIMAGE FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN != 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 IN #attrList[]#
select * from tbl_survey_config where user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

insert.selectKey: select 1 from dual where not exists (select tenant_id, user_id from tbl_survey_config where user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#)
insert.isEqual: insert into tbl_survey_config (user_id, company_id, list_count, preview_flag, list_w_percent, list_h_percent, tenant_id) values (#userId#, #companyId#, #listCount#, #prevMode#, #contentWPrev#, #contentHPrev#, #tenantId#)
insert.isNotEqual: update tbl_survey_config set preview_flag = #prevMode#, list_count = #listCount#, list_w_percent = #contentWPrev#, list_h_percent = #contentHPrev# where user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select:
select s2.* from (
where survey_id in #surveyList[]# and use_status != 0 and tenant_id = #tenantId# and company_id = #companyId# ) s2

select d4.cn from ( select * from tbl_deptmaster d1 where d1.cn = #deptId# and d1.tenant_id = #tenantId# union select d3.* from tbl_deptmaster d3 join tbl_addjobmaster a on d3.cn = a.deptid and a.cn = #userId# and d3.tenant_id = a.tenant_id where d3.tenant_id = #tenantId# ) d4

select d4.DEPT_CD_PATH from ( select * from tbl_deptmaster d1 where d1.cn = #deptId# and d1.tenant_id = #tenantId# union select * from tbl_deptmaster d2 where d2.cn = #companyId# and d2.tenant_id = #tenantId# union select d3.* from tbl_deptmaster d3 join tbl_addjobmaster a on d3.cn = a.deptid and a.cn = #userId# and d3.tenant_id = a.tenant_id where d3.tenant_id = #tenantId# ) d4

SELECT DISTINCT(survey_id) FROM tbl_survey_participant a join tbl_usermaster b on a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id and a.company_id = b.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME and b.cn = #userId# WHERE ( (user_id = #userId# AND user_type = 'user') OR (user_id IN
#deptList[]# and (user_type = 'dept' OR user_type = 'comp') ) OR (user_id IN
#allDeptList[]#
and (user_type = 'dept' OR user_type = 'comp') AND SUBDEPTYN = 'Y' ) OR (a.user_type = 'jikchek' and (b.extensionattribute8 = a.user_id or a.user_id in (select jobid from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) )) OR (a.user_type = 'jikwi' and (b.extensionattribute7 = a.user_id or a.user_id in (select jobid from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) ) ) OR (user_type = 'group' and a.user_id in ( select distinct c.group_id from tbl_permissiongroupinfo c join tbl_usermaster d on d.tenant_id = c.tenant_id and d.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND c.company_id = #companyId# and d.cn = #userId# where c.group_id = a.user_id and ( (c.member_type = 'JIKCHEK' and (d.extensionattribute8 = c.member_id or c.member_id in (select jobid from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) )) or (c.member_type = 'JIKWI' and (d.extensionattribute7 = c.member_id or c.member_id in (select jobid from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) )) or (c.member_type = 'ORGAN' and d.physicaldeliveryofficename = c.member_id) or
(c.member_type = 'USER' and d.CN = c.member_id) or
(c.member_type = 'DEPT' and (d.department = c.member_id or c.member_id in (select deptid from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) )) ) ) ) ) AND a.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND a.company_id = #companyId#
survey_id = #surveyId#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_survey ( survey_id, title, purpose, user_id, create_date, start_date, end_date, user_name1, user_name2, use_status, open_days, result_public_flag, anonymous_flag, multi_answer_flag, participate_flag, attach_flag, modify_flag, draft_flag, response_flag, delete_user, update_user, update_date, total_user, company_id, tenant_id, mail_flag, popup_flag, closing_text, user_exposed_flag ) values ( #surveyId#, #title#, #purpose#, #creatorId#, #createDate#, #startDate#, #endDate#, #creatorName1#, #creatorName2#, #useStatus#, #openDays#, #resultPublicFlag#, #anonymousFlag#, #multiAnswerFlag#, #paritipateFlag#, #attachFlag#, #modifyFlag#, #draftFlag#, #responseFlag#, #deleteUser#, #updateUser#, #updateDate#, #totalUser#, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #mailFlag#, #popupFlag#, #closingText#, #userExposedFlag# )
sqlMap.update:
update tbl_survey set
title = #title#, purpose = #purpose#, user_id = #creatorId#, create_date = #createDate#, start_date = #startDate#, end_date = #endDate#, user_name1 = #creatorName1#, user_name2 = #creatorName2#, use_status = #useStatus#, open_days = #openDays#, result_public_flag = #resultPublicFlag#, anonymous_flag = #anonymousFlag#, multi_answer_flag = #multiAnswerFlag#, participate_flag = #paritipateFlag#, attach_flag = #attachFlag#, modify_flag = #modifyFlag#, draft_flag = #draftFlag#, response_flag = #responseFlag#, total_user = #totalUser#, delete_user = #deleteUser#, update_user = #updateUser#, update_date = #updateDate#, mail_flag = #mailFlag#, popup_flag = #popupFlag#, closing_text = #closingText#, user_exposed_flag = #userExposedFlag#
use_status = #useStatus#, open_days = #openDays#, result_public_flag = #resultPublicFlag#, anonymous_flag = #anonymousFlag#, multi_answer_flag = #multiAnswerFlag#, participate_flag = #paritipateFlag#, attach_flag = #attachFlag#, modify_flag = #modifyFlag#, draft_flag = #draftFlag#, response_flag = #responseFlag#, delete_user = #deleteUser#, update_user = #updateUser#, update_date = #updateDate#
result_public_flag = #resultPublicFlag#, anonymous_flag = #anonymousFlag#, multi_answer_flag = #multiAnswerFlag#, participate_flag = #paritipateFlag#, attach_flag = #attachFlag#, modify_flag = #modifyFlag#, draft_flag = #draftFlag#, response_flag = #responseFlag#
where survey_id = #surveyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.select: select ifnull(max(survey_id) + 1, 1) from tbl_survey
select count(survey_id) from tbl_survey

order by update_date desc, survey_id desc
attach_flag create_date SURVEY_ID CAST(SUBSTR(title, 1, 100) AS varchar(100)) end_date participate_flag user_name1 user_name2 result_public_flag anonymous_flag PARTICIPANTS PARTICIPATION DESC, update_date desc, survey_id desc
limit #startPoint#, #listCount#

WHERE use_status = 1 AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND modify_flag = 0
(start_date <= #today# and end_date >= #today#) AND ( ( (survey_id = -1 or user_id = #userId#)
survey_id in #surveyIds[]#
) OR ( RESULT_PUBLIC_FLAG = 2 AND (survey_id = -1 or user_id = #userId#)
survey_id in #surveyResultIds[]#
) ) AND draft_flag = 0 AND popup_flag = 1 AND survey_id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT(SURV.survey_id) FROM tbl_survey SURV INNER JOIN tbl_survey_respondent RESP ON SURV.survey_id = RESP.survey_id AND RESP.user_id = #userId# )
ORDER BY update_date DESC, survey_id DESC
sqlMap.update:
update tbl_survey set update_date = #updateTime#, delete_user = #userId#, use_status = 0 where tenant_id = #tenantId# and company_id = #companyId# and use_status != 0 and survey_id in
#itemList[]#
sqlMap.select: where survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

select survey_id as surveyId, title, user_id as creatorId, user_name1 as creatorName1, user_name2 as creatorName2, date_add(start_date, interval #offset# minute) as startDate, date_add(end_date, interval #offset# minute) as endDate, tenant_id as tenantId, company_id as companyId, mail_flag as mailFlag, mail_sent_flag as mailSentFlag, totalnoti_sent_flag as totalNotiSentFlag from tbl_survey where date_add(start_date, interval #offset# minute) <= current_date and date_add(end_date, interval #offset# minute) >= current_date and use_status = 1 and draft_flag = 0

SELECT DISTINCT D.CN FROM TBL_SURVEY_PARTICIPANT S INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON S.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND (S.USER_TYPE = 'dept' OR S.USER_TYPE = 'comp') AND D.CN = S.USER_ID WHERE S.SURVEY_ID = #v_SURVEYID# AND S.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND S.COMPANY_ID = #v_COMPANYID# AND SUBDEPTYN = 'Y'

SELECT DISTINCT #v_SURVEYID# AS SURVEYID, U.CN AS USERID, U.DISPLAYNAME AS USERNAME1, U.DISPLAYNAME2 AS USERNAME2, U.MAIL AS EMAIL, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS COMPANYID, D.TENANT_ID AS TENANTID FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON D.CN = U.DEPARTMENT AND D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AND D.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE ( DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE CONCAT('%,', #v_UPPERDEPTID#) OR DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%,', #v_UPPERDEPTID#), ',%') OR DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#v_UPPERDEPTID#, ',%') ) AND D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #v_COMPANYID#
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT #v_SURVEYID# AS SURVEYID, A.CN AS USERID, U.DISPLAYNAME AS USERNAME1, U.DISPLAYNAME2 AS USERNAME2, U.MAIL AS EMAIL, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS COMPANYID, D.TENANT_ID AS TENANTID FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON D.CN = A.DEPTID AND D.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON A.CN = U.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE ( DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE CONCAT('%,', #v_UPPERDEPTID#) OR DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%,', #v_UPPERDEPTID#), ',%') OR DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#v_UPPERDEPTID#, ',%') ) AND D.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_survey_question ( question_id, survey_id, question_type, title, levels, use_status, required_flag, logic_flag, slider_logic_point, skip_flag, skip_num, unit, company_id, tenant_id, res_open_flag ) values ( #questionId#, #surveyId#, #type#, #content#, #level#, #useStatus#, #required#, #logicFlag#, #sliderLogicPoint#, #skipFlag#, #skip#, #unit#, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #resOpenFlag# )
sqlMap.select: select ifnull(max(question_id) + 1, 1) from tbl_survey_question
select * from tbl_survey_question where survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# order by levels asc
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_survey_question where survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_survey_option ( option_id, survey_id, question_id, question_type, question_level, content, levels, other_flag, logic_num, row_level, column_level, company_id, tenant_id ) values ( #optionId#, #surveyId#, #questionId#, #questionType#, #questionLevel#, #content#, #level#, #otherFlag#, #logic#, #rowLevel#, #colLevel#, #companyId#, #tenantId# )
sqlMap.select: select ifnull(max(option_id) + 1, 1) from tbl_survey_option
select * from tbl_survey_option where survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# order by question_id asc, levels asc, column_level asc, row_level asc
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_survey_option where survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT mail_sent_flag FROM tbl_survey WHERE survey_id = #surveyId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE tbl_survey SET mail_sent_flag = #mailSentFlag# WHERE survey_id = #surveyId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND
tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT TOTALNOTI_SENT_FLAG FROM TBL_SURVEY WHERE SURVEY_ID = #surveyId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SURVEY SET TOTALNOTI_SENT_FLAG = #totalNotiSentFlag# WHERE SURVEY_ID = #surveyId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: select * from tbl_survey_attachfile where target_id = #surveyId# and target_type = 'survey' and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

select * from tbl_survey_attachfile where ( ( target_id in #questionIds[]# and target_type = 'question' ) or ( target_id in #questionIds[]# and target_type = 'title' ) or ( target_id in #optionIds[]# and target_type = 'option' ) ) and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# order by target_type desc, target_id asc
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_survey_attachfile where survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_survey_participant ( survey_id, user_type, user_id, user_name1, user_name2, email, dept_id, dept_name1, dept_name2, company_id, tenant_id, SUBDEPTYN ) values ( #surveyId#, #userType#, #userId#, #userName1#, #userName2#, #email#, #deptId#, #deptName1#, #deptName2#, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #subDeptYN# )
sqlMap.select: select participant_id, survey_id, user_type, user_id, case when #primary# = '1' then user_name1 else user_name2 end as user_name, user_name1, user_name2, email, dept_id, case when #primary# = '1' then dept_name1 else dept_name2 end as dept_name, dept_name1, dept_name2, company_id, tenant_id, SUBDEPTYN from tbl_survey_participant where survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and ( (user_type = 'user' and user_id in (select cn from tbl_usermaster where tenant_id = #tenantId#)) or user_type != 'user' )
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_survey_participant where survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT cn as cn , case when #primary# = '1'then title else title2 end as position , case when #primary# = '1' then displayname else displayname2 end as displayName , displayname as displayName1 , displayname2 as displayName2 , department as department , case when #primary# = '1' then description else description2 end as departmentName , description as departmentName1 , description2 as departmentName2 , telephonenumber as telephonenumber , mail as mail , extensionattribute2 as userimage FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT U.cn as cn , case when #primary# = '1'then A.title else A.title2 end as position , case when #primary# = '1' then U.displayname else U.displayname2 end as displayName , U.displayname as displayName1 , U.displayname2 as displayName2 , A.DEPTID as department , case when #primary# = '1' then D.displayname else D.displayname2 end as departmentName , D.displayname as departmentName1 , D.displayname2 as departmentName2 , U.telephonenumber as telephonenumber , U.mail as mail , U.extensionattribute2 as userimage FROM tbl_usermaster U INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON U.CN = A.CN AND U.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON A.DEPTID = D.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE A.CN = #userId# AND A.DEPTID = #deptID# AND D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId# AND U.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

select a.cn as dept_id, case when '1' = '1' then a.displayname else a.displayname2 end as dept_name, a.displayname as dept_name1, a.displayname2 as dept_name2, a.mail as mail, a.deptlevel as dept_level, case when (select count(b.cn) from tbl_deptmaster b where a.cn = b.extensionattribute1 and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) = 0 then 0 else 1 end as has_sub from tbl_deptmaster a where a.cn = #deptId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId#
select ifnull(max(response_id) + 1, 1) from tbl_survey_response
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_survey_response ( response_id, survey_id, question_level, question_type, user_id, texts, row_id, column_id, option_id, ranking_level, slider_value, company_id, tenant_id ) values ( #responseId#, #surveyId#, #questionLevel#, #questionType#, #responsorId#, #texts#, #rowId#, #columnId#, #optionId#, #rankingLevel#, #sliderValue#, #companyId#, #tenantId# )
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_survey_response where survey_id = #surveyId# and user_id = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: select * from ( select r.response_id, r.survey_id, r.question_level, r.question_type, r.user_id, r.option_id, r.texts, r.row_id, r.column_id, r.ranking_level, r.slider_value, (select extensionattribute2 from TBL_USERMASTER u where d.user_id = u.cn and d.tenant_id = u.tenant_id) as image, date_add(d.response_date, interval #offset# minute) as response_date, case when #primary# = '1' then d.user_name1 else d.user_name2 end as user_name, case when #primary# = '1' then d.dept_name1 else d.dept_name2 end as dept_name from tbl_survey_response r join tbl_survey_respondent d on r.response_id = d.response_id and r.company_id = d.company_id and r.tenant_id = d.tenant_id where r.survey_id = #surveyId# and r.company_id = #companyId# and r.tenant_id = #tenantId# ) rs order by question_level asc, response_id asc
select count(response_id) from tbl_survey_response where user_id = #userId# and survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
select count(distinct user_id) from tbl_survey_respondent where survey_id = #surveyId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_survey_respondent where survey_id = #surveyId# and user_id = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(user_id) FROM tbl_survey_participant WHERE survey_id = #surveyId# AND ( (user_type = 'user' AND user_id = #userId#) OR (user_id IN #deptList[]# AND (user_type = 'dept' OR user_type = 'comp') ) OR (user_type = 'JIKWI' AND user_id = (SELECT extensionattribute7 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#)) OR (user_type = 'JIKCHEK' AND user_id = (SELECT extensionattribute8 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#)) ) AND company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
SELECT user_id FROM tbl_survey_participant WHERE survey_id = #surveyId# AND user_type = 'group' AND company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
select count(*) from tbl_survey_respondent where survey_id = #surveyId# and user_id = #userId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

select count(distinct(P.survey_id)) from tbl_survey_participant P inner join tbl_survey S on P.survey_id = S.survey_id where ( (P.user_id = #userId# and P.user_type = 'user') or (P.user_id in
#deptList[]#
and (P.user_type = 'dept' or P.user_type = 'comp') ) OR (P.user_id IN
#allDeptList[]#
AND (P.user_type = 'dept' OR P.user_type = 'comp') AND SUBDEPTYN = 'Y' ) ) and P.survey_id not in (select survey_id from tbl_survey_respondent where user_id = #userId#) and S.use_status = 1 and P.tenant_id = #tenantId# and P.company_id = #companyId# and S.draft_flag = 0 and S.modify_flag = 0
and S.start_date <= #today# and S.end_date >= #today#
SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE PROPERTY_NAME = #propertyName# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SURVEY_CONFIG SET PREVIEW_FLAG = #prevMode# WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_SURVEY WHERE SURVEY_ID IN #surveyList[]# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USE_STATUS = 0 AND DELETE_USER IS NOT NULL
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SURVEY_RESULTVIEWPERMISSION(SURVEY_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, CN, USER_TYPE, SUBDEPT_PERMITTED, CNNAME, CNNAME2) VALUES (#survey_id#, #company_id#, #tenant_id#, #cn#, #user_type#, #subdept_permitted#, #cnName#, #cnName2#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT survey_id, company_id, tenant_id, cn, user_type, subdept_permitted, cnName, cnName2 FROM TBL_SURVEY_RESULTVIEWPERMISSION WHERE survey_id = #survey_id# AND company_id = #company_id# AND tenant_id = #tenant_id#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_SURVEY_RESULTVIEWPERMISSION WHERE SURVEY_ID = #survey_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT DISTINCT(survey_id) FROM TBL_SURVEY_RESULTVIEWPERMISSION a join tbl_usermaster b on a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id and a.company_id = b.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME and b.cn = #userId# WHERE ( (a.cn = #userId# AND user_type = 'user') OR ( ( a.cn IN
#deptList[]#
AND (user_type = 'dept' OR user_type = 'comp') ) OR ( a.cn IN
#allDeptList[]#
AND (user_type = 'dept' OR user_type = 'comp') AND SUBDEPT_PERMITTED = 'Y' ) ) OR (a.user_type = 'jikchek' and (b.extensionattribute8 = a.cn or a.cn in (select jobid from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) )) OR (a.user_type = 'jikwi' and (b.extensionattribute7 = a.cn or a.cn in (select jobid from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) ) ) OR (user_type = 'group' and a.cn in ( select distinct c.group_id from tbl_permissiongroupinfo c join tbl_usermaster d on d.tenant_id = c.tenant_id and d.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND c.company_id = #companyId# and d.cn = #userId# where c.group_id = a.cn and ( (c.member_type = 'JIKCHEK' and (d.extensionattribute8 = c.member_id or c.member_id in (select jobid from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) )) or (c.member_type = 'JIKWI' and (d.extensionattribute7 = c.member_id or c.member_id in (select jobid from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) )) or (c.member_type = 'ORGAN' and d.physicaldeliveryofficename = c.member_id) or (c.member_type = 'USER' and d.CN = c.member_id) or (c.member_type = 'DEPT' and (d.department = c.member_id or c.member_id in (select deptid from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) )) ) ) ) ) AND a.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND a.company_id = #companyId# survey_id = #surveyId#
SELECT MODIFY_FLAG, USE_STATUS FROM TBL_SURVEY WHERE SURVEY_ID = #surveyId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SURVEY SET END_DATE = #updateDate#, UPDATE_DATE = #updateDate#, UPDATE_USER = #userID# WHERE SURVEY_ID = #surveyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT MODIFY_FLAG, USE_STATUS FROM TBL_SURVEY WHERE SURVEY_ID = #surveyId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SURVEY SET USE_STATUS = #useStatus# WHERE SURVEY_ID = #surveyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT USER_ID as USERID,
USER_NAME1 as USERNAME1, USER_NAME2 as USERNAME2, DEPT_NAME1 as DEPTNAME1, DEPT_NAME2 as DEPTNAME2, DATE_ADD(RESPONSE_DATE, interval #offset# minute) as RESPONSEDATE, IFNULL(LOTTERY_RESULT, 0) as LOTTERYRESULT,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SURVEY_ID, USER_ID ORDER BY RESPONSE_DATE ASC) as RN FROM TBL_SURVEY_RESPONDENT WHERE SURVEY_ID = #surveyId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) A WHERE A.RN = 1
ORDER BY
A.USERID A.USERNAME1 A.USERNAME2 A.DEPTNAME1 A.DEPTNAME2 A.RESPONSEDATE A.LOTTERYRESULT
ASC DESC
LIMIT #startPoint#, #listCount#
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT USER_ID) FROM TBL_SURVEY_RESPONDENT WHERE SURVEY_ID = #surveyId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SURVEY_RESPONDENT SET LOTTERY_RESULT = CASE WHEN USER_ID IN #targetIds[]# THEN -1 ELSE NULL END WHERE SURVEY_ID = #surveyId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_SURVEY_RESPONDENT SET LOTTERY_RESULT = #number# WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND SURVEY_ID = #surveyId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(LOTTERY_RESULT) FROM TBL_SURVEY_RESPONDENT WHERE SURVEY_ID = #surveyId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND LOTTERY_RESULT IS NOT NULL
